summary: Plan-approve and every per-bead complete pass cleanly with NO override. (1) adr_citations=[ADR-0037, ADR-0036] verified against frontmatter: ADR-0037 Domain(s)=workflow,execution (Accepted); ADR-0036 Domain(s)=workflow,validation,doc-sync,ownership (Accepted). Impacted Domains parse to exactly {workflow, execution} (contextpack ParseSpec takes text before first colon on each `- workflow:`/`- execution:` bullet). checkADRCoverage: workflow covered by both ADRs, execution covered by ADR-0037 -> no adr-coverage-missing. checkADRCitations: intersectFold(0037,{wf,exec})={workflow,execution} non-empty, intersectFold(0036,{wf,exec})={workflow} non-empty -> no adr-cite-irrelevant. (2) Per-bead divergence gate (ValidateDivergence/attributeDomain) consults candidateDomains = normalized declared {execution, workflow} ONLY. Every changed source file globs to a declared domain: internal/hook/** + internal/setup/** -> workflow (both explicit in workflow OWNERSHIP.yaml; internal/setup is workflow-owned, NOT a 3rd domain, NOT core -- the spec-101 redact trap is avoided), cmd/** -> workflow, internal/harness/** -> execution. Single-owner confirmed: no other manifest claims hook/setup/harness/cmd; exactly 4 domain dirs (workflow, execution, core, context-system). No changed file globs to an undeclared domain (core internal/state/** etc. and context-system internal/contextpack/** do not match any B1/B2 path) -> no adr-divergence-unowned, no --override-adr. Test files (_test.go) are also attributed but glob to the same wf/exec packages, so they map cleanly. (3) Spec-100 normalize-then-glob gate (merged on main) on the resolved declared set still passes: every file owned+covered. (4) No self-block: the ADR-0037 doc edit (.mindspec/docs/adr/...) is isProcessArtifact (isDocFile matches .mindspec/docs/ prefix) -> skipped before attribution; .beads/ and review/ likewise skipped. Both beads' depends_on=[] and both ADRs are Accepted, so coverageOf returns coveredAccepted (silent pass) at the bead-complete lane. No forced override, no uncovered domain, no undeclared-domain-owned file.
